name: Glitch Trail
notes: This effect is meant to be on top of the user's provided media.

name: Tropical Ascii Cam
notes: This shader by default uses the webcam as an input, but the user will likely want to replace with a video or some other media.

name: Dither Cam
notes: This shader by default uses the webcam as an input, but the user will likely want to replace with a video or some other media.

name: Dither Logo
notes: The logo for this shader can be replaced by updating the image texture that's used as a mask.

name: Neon Sign
notes: In some cases the user may not want this effect to "flicker", in which case there's a prop on the Neon component to control that
